entities.description: A global condition affecting millions of people worldwide

entities.description: Farmers who account for 78% of cultivated land and 75% of agricultural output in Malawi

entities.name: FOOD SELF SUFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ability of a household to meet its own food needs, hindered by small farm sizes

entities.description: The size of land parcels, which are often too small in Malawi to achieve food self sufficiency

entities.name: GROSS DOMESTIC PRODUCT
entities.description: An economic measure of Malawi's economy, with agriculture accounting for 39%

entities.name: LABOR FORCE
